[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011111 5
1 1010100 3
2 0001101 3
3 1011001 4
4 1000010 2
5 0000000 a
6 0110001 3
7 1111000 4

23 0000000 a match 5
